206.reason: [The token "&&" is added unconditionally before verifying that the next character is also '&'. If only a single '&' exists, this incorrectly adds an AND token before reporting the error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The token "&&" is added unconditionally before verifying that the next character is also '&'. If only a single '&' exists, this incorrectly adds an AND token before reporting the error.]

214.reason: [The token "||" is added unconditionally before verifying that the next character is also '|'. If only a single '|' exists, this incorrectly adds an OR token before reporting the error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The token "||" is added unconditionally before verifying that the next character is also '|'. If only a single '|' exists, this incorrectly adds an OR token before reporting the error.]
